caption: Attribute Dictionary
description: The Attribute Dictionary defines schema attributes and includes references to the events and objects in which they are used.
name: dictionary

debug.caption: Debug Information
debug.description: Alpha example extension update of debug. Debug information about non-fatal issues with this OCSF event. Each issue is a line in this string array.

ip.caption: IP Address
ip.description: Alpha extension version of the IP Address attribute showing the base schema's ip attribute.

video_game_name.caption: Video Game Name
video_game_name.description: Video game name added by the alpha example extension.

types.caption: Data Types
types.description: The data types available in OCSF. Each data type specifies constraints in the form regular expressions, max lengths or value limits. Implementers of OCSF should ensure they abide to these constraints.

ip_t.caption: IP Address (Alpha extension)
ip_t.description: Alpha extension version of Internet Protocol address (IP address) shadowing base schema's ip_t.

video_game_name_t.caption: Video Game Name Type
video_game_name_t.description: Video game name type added by the alpha example extension.
